svg.title: 2990s Sofa Module — 1B-LHF — Bench (chaise) on LEFT, regular arm on RIGHT
svg.desc: Top-down plan view. 1 seat with backrest only over the seat portion (right side). LEFT side: wide soft bench/chaise cushion taking the full module height (no backrest above it) — clearly bigger than the armrest on the opposite side. RIGHT side: regular tall narrow hard armrest.
